ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Navy Beans (51%), Ham Sauce (49%) [Water, Tomatoes (11%), Sugar, Maize Thickener (1422), Salt, Corn Oil, Ham (0.2%) (Contains Soy, Preservative (250)), Food Acids (Acetic Acid, Citric Acid), Colours (Caramel III, Paprika Extract), Flavours, Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin)]. CONTAINS Soy.
